summary: InvoiceAI MVP full-stack testing completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All screens load and navigate correctly. Auth flow, CRUD operations, and all major screens verified.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for created resources (minor HTTP convention issue)

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '[Layout children]: Too many screens defined. Route onboarding is extraneous.' - extraneous route defined in layout

action_items: Consider returning 201 status code from POST /api/invoices (minor convention)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py vendor upsert uses double $inc operator in same update call (line 456-457) - second $inc for total_spend will silently overwrite first $inc for total_invoices. Should be combined: {$inc: {total_invoices: 1, total_spend: amount}}
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing (TEST_*@test.com, uitest_*@test.com, nav_*@test.com, tabs_*@test.com, vendor_*@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth (JWT login/register), all CRUD endpoints, and all 5 tab screens tested and working. Capture screen shows 3 options (Take Photo, Upload Image, Upload PDF). Export screen accessible from Ledger. Settings shows user profile. Backend at 100% pass rate.
rca_of_issue: Vendor upsert bug in server.py line 456-457: Two separate $inc operators in same MongoDB update call - MongoDB will only apply the last one. The vendor total_invoices counter will never increment because the second $inc for total_spend overwrites it. Fix: combine into single $inc: {'total_invoices': 1, 'total_spend': float(data.grand_total or 0)}
